2026-06-18T12:00:01Z DEBUG api: request headers {"Authorization": "Bearer ghp_FAKEghp_FAKEghp_FAKEghp_FAKE", "X-Token": "abc-token-value-abc-token-value-abc"}
2026-06-18T12:00:02Z INFO runner: env var GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_FAKEghp_FAKEghp_FAKEghp_FAKE
2026-06-18T12:00:03Z WARN runner: secret appears in JSON body: {"token": "ghp_FAKEghp_FAKEghp_FAKEghp_FAKE", "user": "alice"}
2026-06-18T12:00:04Z INFO runner: this line has no secret, it should pass through untouched
